title: AuthorizeOfflinePassRequest
description: Sent by the station to the server to validate an offline pass presented via BLE, including chain integrity fields for replay protection.

offlinePassId.description: Unique identifier of the offline pass.

offlinePass.description: The offline pass payload containing authorization data.

deviceId.description: Identifier of the mobile device presenting the offline pass.

counter.description: Monotonic usage counter for replay protection.

bayId.description: Identifier of the bay where the service is requested.

serviceId.description: Identifier of the service being requested.
